requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio Disturbance of Lighting Equipment (CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备 EMC / 无线电骚扰（CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備 EMC / 無線電騷擾（CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility for lighting equipment in Singapore is principally governed through the radio disturbance characteristics standard CISPR 15 (adopted nationally as SS CISPR 15), which sets conducted (150 kHz–30 MHz) and radiated (30 MHz–300 MHz) emission limits for electrical lighting and similar equipment. Unlike the EU, Singapore does not operate a single horizontal EMC Directive with mandatory CE-style EMC self-declaration for all lighting; instead EMC performance is addressed as part of product safety/quality conformity and, for any product with a radio transmitter, through IMDA's equipment registration framework (which references the relevant EMC and radio standards). Manufacturers commonly hold a CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15 emissions test report in the technical documentation. For products with wireless functions, IMDA equipment registration is the operative mandatory step (see ledsg-emc-02).
summary.zh: 新加坡照明设备的电磁兼容性主要通过无线电骚扰特性标准 CISPR 15（在国内采用为 SS CISPR 15）管理，其规定电气照明及类似设备的传导（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射（30 MHz–300 MHz）发射限值。与欧盟不同，新加坡并不针对所有照明设置单一的横向 EMC 指令及强制性 CE 式 EMC 自我声明；电磁兼容性作为产品安全/质量符合性的一部分处理，对于带无线电发射器的产品，则通过 IMDA 的设备注册框架（引用相关 EMC 及无线电标准）管理。制造商通常在技术文件中持有 CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15 发射检测报告。对于带无线功能的产品，IMDA 设备注册是实际的强制步骤（见 ledsg-emc-02）。
summary.zht: 新加坡照明設備的電磁兼容性主要通過無線電騷擾特性標準 CISPR 15（在國內採用為 SS CISPR 15）管理，其規定電氣照明及類似設備的傳導（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射（30 MHz–300 MHz）發射限值。與歐盟不同，新加坡並不針對所有照明設置單一的橫向 EMC 指令及強制性 CE 式 EMC 自我聲明；電磁兼容性作為產品安全/質量符合性的一部分處理，對於帶無線電發射器的產品，則通過 IMDA 的設備注冊框架（引用相關 EMC 及無線電標準）管理。製造商通常在技術文件中持有 CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15 發射檢測報告。對於帶無線功能的產品，IMDA 設備注冊是實際的強制步驟（見 ledsg-emc-02）。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment
IMDA equipment registration framework (for products incorporating radio transmitters)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (which covers both safety and EMC for relevant product categories). Testing must be conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories in China. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are based on the same CISPR 15 technical base but are not automatically accepted under Singapore's conformity and IMDA frameworks.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测须在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告基于相同的 CISPR 15 技术基础，但不自动被新加坡的符合性及 IMDA 框架接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測須在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告基於相同的 CISPR 15 技術基礎，但不自動被新加坡的符合性及 IMDA 框架接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15 and China's GB 17743 share the same CISPR 15 technical base, so the emission limits are largely harmonized and existing Chinese emissions test data is technically relevant. The differences are procedural: (1) Singapore has no single horizontal EMC self-declaration regime equivalent to the EU EMC Directive — EMC is addressed within product conformity and, for radio products, within IMDA registration, so the documentation route differs; (2) for any luminaire with a wireless function, the operative mandatory control is IMDA equipment registration referencing the applicable radio/EMC standards (see ledsg-emc-02), not a standalone EMC declaration; (3) where a CAB report is needed for the SAFETY Mark or for IMDA, confirm the issuing laboratory's report is accepted, since a Chinese CCC EMC report is not automatically recognised. Manufacturers should retain a current CISPR 15 emissions report in the technical file.
gap.zh: CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15 与中国 GB 17743 同源于 CISPR 15，发射限值基本协调，现有中国发射检测数据在技术上相关。差异在于程序：（1）新加坡没有相当于欧盟 EMC 指令的单一横向 EMC 自我声明制度——电磁兼容性在产品符合性内处理，对无线电产品则在 IMDA 注册内处理，文件路径不同；（2）对于带无线功能的灯具，实际强制控制是引用适用无线电/EMC 标准的 IMDA 设备注册（见 ledsg-emc-02），而非独立的 EMC 声明；（3）当 SAFETY 安全标志或 IMDA 需要 CAB 报告时，须确认出具实验室的报告被接受，因为中国 CCC EMC 报告不自动获认可。制造商应在技术文件中保留现行 CISPR 15 发射报告。
gap.zht: CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15 與中國 GB 17743 同源於 CISPR 15，發射限值基本協調，現有中國發射檢測數據在技術上相關。差異在於程序：（1）新加坡沒有相當於歐盟 EMC 指令的單一橫向 EMC 自我聲明制度——電磁兼容性在產品符合性內處理，對無線電產品則在 IMDA 注冊內處理，文件路徑不同；（2）對於帶無線功能的燈具，實際強制控制是引用適用無線電/EMC 標準的 IMDA 設備注冊（見 ledsg-emc-02），而非獨立的 EMC 聲明；（3）當 SAFETY 安全標誌或 IMDA 需要 CAB 報告時，須確認出具實驗室的報告被接受，因為中國 CCC EMC 報告不自動獲認可。製造商應在技術文件中保留現行 CISPR 15 發射報告。

mandatory_status.target: Context-dependent — EMC is addressed through product conformity and, for radio products, through mandatory IMDA equipment registration; CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15 is the applicable emissions standard. There is no single horizontal EMC self-declaration regime equivalent to the EU EMC Directive.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Singapore does not operate a single horizontal EMC self-declaration regime equivalent to the EU EMC Directive; lighting EMC is addressed via CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15 emissions limits within product conformity, and via IMDA equipment registration for any product with a radio transmitter. Emission limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), so existing emissions data is technically relevant, but a Chinese CCC report is not automatically accepted. For wireless luminaires the operative mandatory control is IMDA registration (see ledsg-emc-02). Retain a current CISPR 15 emissions report in the technical file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新加坡不设相当于欧盟 EMC 指令的单一横向 EMC 自我声明制度；照明 EMC 通过产品符合性内的 CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15 发射限值，以及对带无线电发射器产品的 IMDA 设备注册处理。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，因此现有发射数据在技术上相关，但中国 CCC 报告不自动被接受。对于无线灯具，实际强制控制是 IMDA 注册（见 ledsg-emc-02）。请在技术文件中保留现行 CISPR 15 发射报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 新加坡不設相當於歐盟 EMC 指令的單一橫向 EMC 自我聲明制度；照明 EMC 通過產品符合性內的 CISPR 15 / SS CISPR 15 發射限值，以及對帶無線電發射器產品的 IMDA 設備注冊處理。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，因此現有發射數據在技術上相關，但中國 CCC 報告不自動被接受。對於無線燈具，實際強制控制是 IMDA 注冊（見 ledsg-emc-02）。請在技術文件中保留現行 CISPR 15 發射報告。

requirement_topic.en: IMDA Equipment Registration for Wireless / Smart Lighting Functions
requirement_topic.zh: 无线/智能照明功能的 IMDA 设备注册
requirement_topic.zht: 無線/智能照明功能的 IMDA 設備注冊

summary.en: Any LED luminaire or lamp that incorporates a radio transmitter (e.g. Bluetooth dimming, Wi-Fi smart lighting, Zigbee/Thread mesh, or RF remote control) is short-range or telecommunication equipment under IMDA's Equipment Registration Framework and must be registered with IMDA before it is sold, offered for sale, or used in Singapore. Registration is done by a local registrant and requires test reports demonstrating conformity to IMDA's technical specifications for the relevant radio interface (which reference international radio and EMC standards) and operation within Singapore's permitted frequency bands and power limits. Depending on risk, products fall under a General/Simplified/Full registration tier. Registered equipment may be required to display the IMDA compliance label/Equipment Registration number. This obligation is separate from, and additional to, the SAFETY Mark electrical-safety registration.
summary.zh: 任何集成无线电发射器的 LED 灯具或灯泡（如蓝牙调光、Wi-Fi 智能照明、Zigbee/Thread 网状网络或射频遥控）属于 IMDA 设备注册框架下的短距离或电信设备，须在新加坡销售、要约销售或使用前向 IMDA 注册。注册由本地注册人办理，须提交检测报告，证明符合 IMDA 针对相关无线电接口的技术规范（引用国际无线电及 EMC 标准），并在新加坡许可的频段及功率限值内运行。视风险而定，产品适用一般/简化/完整注册级别。注册设备可能须显示 IMDA 合规标签/设备注册号。此义务独立于 SAFETY 安全标志电气安全注册并附加于其上。
summary.zht: 任何集成無線電發射器的 LED 燈具或燈泡（如藍牙調光、Wi-Fi 智能照明、Zigbee/Thread 網狀網絡或射頻遙控）屬於 IMDA 設備注冊框架下的短距離或電信設備，須在新加坡銷售、要約銷售或使用前向 IMDA 注冊。注冊由本地注冊人辦理，須提交檢測報告，證明符合 IMDA 針對相關無線電接口的技術規範（引用國際無線電及 EMC 標準），並在新加坡許可的頻段及功率限值內運行。視風險而定，產品適用一般/簡化/完整注冊級別。注冊設備可能須顯示 IMDA 合規標籤/設備注冊號。此義務獨立於 SAFETY 安全標誌電氣安全注冊並附加於其上。

standards_or_laws: IMDA Equipment Registration Framework (General / Simplified / Full registration tiers) — Telecommunications Act and IMDA technical specifications
IMDA technical specifications for short-range devices / radio-communication equipment (Singapore frequency allocation and power limits)

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission / State Radio Monitoring Center) type approval for the radio module, in addition to CCC for the electrical product. SRRC type approval governs permitted frequency bands and transmit power within China's national radio plan, and may involve CMIIT ID marking. SRRC approval is specific to China's frequency allocation and is not recognised by IMDA; Singapore's permitted bands and power limits differ from China's, so the radio parameters must be re-verified for Singapore.
summary.zh: 在中国，集成无线功能的灯具除电气产品的 CCC 外，还须就无线电模块取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会/国家无线电监测中心）型号核准。SRRC 型号核准依据中国国家无线电规划管理许可频段及发射功率，并可能涉及 CMIIT ID 标识。SRRC 核准针对中国的频率分配，不被 IMDA 认可；新加坡许可的频段及功率限值与中国不同，因此无线电参数须针对新加坡重新验证。
summary.zht: 在中國，集成無線功能的燈具除電氣產品的 CCC 外，還須就無線電模組取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會/國家無線電監測中心）型號核准。SRRC 型號核准依據中國國家無線電規劃管理許可頻段及發射功率，並可能涉及 CMIIT ID 標識。SRRC 核准針對中國的頻率分配，不被 IMDA 認可；新加坡許可的頻段及功率限值與中國不同，因此無線電參數須針對新加坡重新驗證。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless radio modules in China (CMIIT ID marking)
CCC certification — required for the electrical product under CNCA-C10-01

gap.en: IMDA equipment registration is a distinct mandatory step with no direct overlap with Chinese SRRC approval — the two are not mutually recognised. Chinese manufacturers exporting smart/wireless LED lighting to Singapore must: (1) appoint a local registrant to file with IMDA; (2) ensure the radio module operates within Singapore's permitted frequency bands and power limits (which differ from China's SRRC allocation), re-tuning or re-certifying the module if needed; (3) provide radio/EMC test reports conforming to IMDA's technical specifications — Chinese SRRC test reports are not accepted; (4) determine the correct registration tier (General/Simplified/Full) and display the IMDA Equipment Registration label where required. This is in addition to the SAFETY Mark CPS registration for the electrical-safety aspects. A purely passive (non-wireless) luminaire does not trigger IMDA registration.
gap.zh: IMDA 设备注册是独立的强制步骤，与中国 SRRC 核准无直接重叠——两者不互认。向新加坡出口智能/无线 LED 照明的中国制造商须：（1）委任本地注册人向 IMDA 申报；（2）确保无线电模块在新加坡许可的频段及功率限值内运行（与中国 SRRC 分配不同），必要时重新调谐或重新认证模块；（3）提供符合 IMDA 技术规范的无线电/EMC 检测报告——中国 SRRC 检测报告不被接受；（4）确定正确的注册级别（一般/简化/完整），并在要求时显示 IMDA 设备注册标签。此项附加于电气安全方面的 SAFETY 安全标志 CPS 注册之上。纯被动（无无线）灯具不触发 IMDA 注册。
gap.zht: IMDA 設備注冊是獨立的強制步驟，與中國 SRRC 核准無直接重疊——兩者不互認。向新加坡出口智能/無線 LED 照明的中國製造商須：（1）委任本地注冊人向 IMDA 申報；（2）確保無線電模組在新加坡許可的頻段及功率限值內運行（與中國 SRRC 分配不同），必要時重新調諧或重新認證模組；（3）提供符合 IMDA 技術規範的無線電/EMC 檢測報告——中國 SRRC 檢測報告不被接受；（4）確定正確的注冊級別（一般/簡化/完整），並在要求時顯示 IMDA 設備注冊標籤。此項附加於電氣安全方面的 SAFETY 安全標誌 CPS 注冊之上。純被動（無無線）燈具不觸發 IMDA 注冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless-enabled products — any LED luminaire/lamp with a radio transmitter must be registered with IMDA before sale or use in Singapore; tier depends on the equipment type. Passive luminaires are out of scope of IMDA registration.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless modules — SRRC type approval required for the radio module in China, in addition to CCC for the electrical product

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires or lamps with any wireless function (Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, Zigbee, RF remote) must be registered with IMDA under its Equipment Registration Framework before being sold or used in Singapore, via a local registrant, with radio/EMC test reports conforming to IMDA technical specifications and Singapore's permitted bands and power limits. Chinese SRRC type approval is not recognised by IMDA and the radio parameters must be re-verified for Singapore. This is separate from and additional to the SAFETY Mark CPS registration. Passive, non-wireless luminaires do not require IMDA registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 带任何无线功能（蓝牙、Wi-Fi、Zigbee、射频遥控）的 LED 灯具或灯泡，在新加坡销售或使用前须依据 IMDA 设备注册框架，通过本地注册人向 IMDA 注册，并提交符合 IMDA 技术规范及新加坡许可频段和功率限值的无线电/EMC 检测报告。中国 SRRC 型号核准不被 IMDA 认可，无线电参数须针对新加坡重新验证。此项独立于 SAFETY 安全标志 CPS 注册并附加于其上。纯被动、无无线的灯具无需 IMDA 注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 帶任何無線功能（藍牙、Wi-Fi、Zigbee、射頻遙控）的 LED 燈具或燈泡，在新加坡銷售或使用前須依據 IMDA 設備注冊框架，通過本地注冊人向 IMDA 注冊，並提交符合 IMDA 技術規範及新加坡許可頻段和功率限值的無線電/EMC 檢測報告。中國 SRRC 型號核准不被 IMDA 認可，無線電參數須針對新加坡重新驗證。此項獨立於 SAFETY 安全標誌 CPS 注冊並附加於其上。純被動、無無線的燈具無需 IMDA 注冊。
